channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: HP Omen Max 45L Review: 4K60 Gaming Has Never Been So Easy
item.description: Thanks to the ongoing RAM crisis, this pre-built PC tower may be a cheaper way to upgrade your desktop gaming experience.

item.title: Is the Slate Truck too minimal for its own good?
item.description: The first thing you notice about the Slate Truck is its size. It's small, surprisingly so. In a country where trucks often come with their own zip code, Slate's pickup is refreshingly puny, measuring 174.6 inches long, 70.6 inches wide, and 69.3 inches tall, with a curb weight of approximately 3,602 pounds (1,634kg). As a […]

item.title: Devils on the Moon brings the score-chasing of pinball to the Playdate
item.description: Pinball video games have been around for years — I cut my teeth on Space Cadet 3D Pinball, which was pre-loaded on Windows 95. They range from realistic recreations of pinball tables you’ll find at arcades to games that could never exist in real life like 2019’s Demon’s Tilt or older ones like Metroid Prime Pinball for the Nintendo DS or Pokémon Pinball for the Game Boy Color. I didn’t expect to find a detailed pinball game for the humble and delightful Playdate, but a pair of developers working under the name Amano pulled it off with Devils on the Moon Pinball, which arrived last week. It’s t...

item.title: How the Amazon Echo learned to talk — and listen
item.description: Jeff Bezos badly wanted a voice computer. He had been saying so publicly since the very early days of Amazon, telling anyone who would listen about why voice might make it easier and more natural to interact with technology. (And to buy stuff from Jeff Bezos.) But when a team at Amazon set out to […]

item.title: Test du Lenovo ThinkBook Plus G6 Rollable : l’écran enroulable est vraiment là !
item.description: Ça y est : Lenovo a enfin sorti un véritable produit sur le marché qui profite de ses écrans enroulables. Le ThinkBook Plus G6 Rollable est là, mais est-il au niveau ?

item.title: 'The farmer isn't disappearing — they're moving up the stack': How AI is reshaping the role of modern agriculture
item.description: New robotics and AI tools are helping agriculture address workforce shortages while improving safety, productivity, and long-term sustainability.

item.title: Best Apple Watch Bands of 2026: Nike, Hermés, and More
item.description: We've actually been testing bands since the first Apple Watch launched in 2015. From silicone sports straps to leather bands, I've rounded up the best for every occasion.

item.title: Grammarly’s sloppelganger saga
item.description: This is The Stepback, a weekly newsletter breaking down one essential story from the tech world. For more on the ups and downs of AI, follow Stevie Bonifield. The Stepback arrives in our subscribers' inboxes at 8AM ET. Opt in for The Stepback here. How it started Most people probably know Grammarly for its browser […]

item.title: Miss the headphone jack on your iPhone? These wired headphones are the next-best thing
item.description: It's been a decade since Apple controversially nixed the 3.5mm jack, and wired headphones are still very much in demand.

item.title: Xiaomi propose son réfrigérateur connecté, modulable et spacieux avec 100 euros de réduction
item.description: Aussi étonnant que cela puisse paraître, Xiaomi vend aussi un réfrigérateur connecté d'une grande capacité, le Mijia Cross Door 502L. Il est à retrouver à 749 euros au lieu de 849 euros sur le site de Xiaomi.
